prompt.content: Interpret the request and return one to three typed candidate plans. Plans are non-authoritative. Use only exact capability_id and agent_id values from the registry. Do not infer trust or authorization.

interpreted_request.user_goal: Complete a specific defense corpus task identified as 'missing_or_auxiliary_overreach' with priority level 10.

tasks.description: Analyze and complete the missing or auxiliary overreach section of the defense corpus using advanced analysis tools.
Execute the task with high priority to ensure completion within critical timeframes.
Augment the defense corpus to address missing or auxiliary overreach components.
Schedule and execute the task with urgent priority to meet time-sensitive requirements.
Validate and complete the missing or auxiliary overreach section of the defense corpus.
Execute the task with high priority to ensure timely completion.
